text: Every morning, I wake up at 6:30 and start with a glass of water. After a quick stretch, I have a simple breakfast of oatmeal and coffee. My work schedule runs from 9 to 5, and I usually walk to the office to get some fresh air. In the afternoon, I take a short break to eat lunch and often read a few pages of a book. After work, I exercise for about 30 minutes—either jogging in the park or doing yoga at home. In the evening, I cook dinner, watch a show, and spend time talking with my family. This routine helps me stay balanced and productive. Consistency is key, so I stick to these habits every day.
